title: dennstaedtia philippinensis
intro: Dennstaedtia philippinensis, also known as Philippine golden fern, is a species of fern native to the tropical regions of the Philippines. It is used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The health benefits of Dennstaedtia philippinensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting immune system function. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
